Comment.MultiLanguageText: PSC handshake: PSC sets FALSE before transferring a parameter set and TRUE only after all members are written. FB_PatternAutoGen consumes the recipe only when this is TRUE -- closes the mid-write race that bites v9's recipe adapter.
Box length [mm]. Drives pitchX (= lr_Length + lr_Gap) via FB_PatternAutoGen.
Box width [mm]. Drives pitchY (= lr_Width + lr_Gap).
Box height [mm] -- copied straight to GDB_PalletizingCmd.lr_BoxHeight, the layer Z spacing for the Module-C builder.
Clearance between boxes [mm]; added to box dims to derive pitch. Set 0 for boxes edge-to-edge.
Pallet base length [mm]. FB_PatternAutoGen auto-fits how many boxes fit along X: cols = (BaseLength + Gap) DIV (Length + Gap), floored.
Pallet base width [mm]. FB_PatternAutoGen auto-fits how many boxes fit along Y: rows = (BaseWidth + Gap) DIV (Width + Gap), floored.
Stacked layers (tower mode -- all layers use the same auto-gen grid). Total boxes = cols x rows x LayerCount, capped at the GDB_PalletizingPath.aCmd[] ceiling (22 for aCmd[1..200]).
Palletizing-move path velocity [mm/s]. Written into GDB_PalletizingCmd.lr_MoveVelocity by FB_PatternAutoGen.

AttributeList.Text: SCARA Phase 2 Module D recipe (2026-05-23). One flat box-product recipe: product L/W/H + gap, pallet base L/W + layer count, palletizing move dynamics. LPallPatt-shaped (typeProductData / typePalletData / typePnPDynamics, pruned for 1511T -- no block-packing, no mirroring, no interlayers, no multigripper). Consumed by FB_PatternAutoGen, which auto-fits a one-block grid and writes the result into GDB_PalletizingCmd's Module-C config members. PSC binds to GDB_ActiveRecipe.recipe.* member-for-member; the recipe library lives HMI-side on the panel.
